  2. About TurfCalculator

About TurfCalculator

Our Mission

TurfCalculator provides free, accurate, and fast lawn calculators for homeowners and DIYers. Whether you're buying sod, planting seed, or planning your lawn care schedule, we give you the numbers you need in 30 seconds or less.

No signup. No email. No data collection. Just tools that work.

How We Calculate

All our calculators use industry-standard formulas and data from university extension services, USDA guidelines, and turfgrass research institutions. We cite our sources and keep our data current.

All calculations happen in your browser — we never see your inputs or results. Your data stays on your device.

Who Is This For?

Homeowners planning a sod installation or lawn renovation.

DIY gardeners who want to know how much seed, fertilizer, or soil to buy.

Anyone standing in the garden center aisle wondering, "How much do I need?"

Disclaimer

Our calculators provide estimates based on industry averages. Actual amounts may vary based on your specific site conditions, local supplier specifications, and installation methods. Always verify quantities with your local supplier before purchasing.

Privacy Terms Disclaimer Cookies

© 2026 TurfCalculator. Free lawn calculators for everyone.
